---
title: "Nathan Machuki Onduma"
subtitle: "Senior MEL and Data Science Leader"
listing: false
---

::: {.hero}

## Evidence-informed decision making across complex programs and partnerships

I work at the intersection of measurement, evaluation, data science, and global health, helping organizations build practical evidence systems that support better decisions across complex programs and partnerships. My work focuses on translating data into actionable insights for governments, donors, and implementing partners, with experience leading multi-country learning, performance measurement, and evidence-generation initiatives across Africa.

::: {.hero-actions}
[View CV](cv.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Explore projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
[RPubs portfolio](https://rpubs.com/Onduma){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

:::

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .cardbox}
### MEL leadership
Multi-country evidence, learning, and performance systems supporting adaptive management, partner performance oversight, and strategic decision-making across health and development programs.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .cardbox}
### Data science
Quantitative and qualitative analysis and applied data science supporting evidence generation, implementation learning, and strategic decision-making across development programs using statistical modelling, survey analytics, R, and Power BI.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .cardbox}
### Systems Strengthening
Global health systems strengthening through evidence use, digital transformation, and implementation data systems across NTD, HIV, and RMNCAH programs using DHIS2, EMR systems, KoboToolbox, and ODK.
:::
:::

## Featured work

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .project-card}
### Neglected tropical diseases and MEL systems
Current work focuses on MEL strategy, evidence generation, implementation learning, and performance analytics for neglected tropical disease programs, including visceral leishmaniasis and trachoma.

[Read the CV](cv.qmd#professional-experience)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .project-card}
### Statistical and data science notes
RPubs hosts some of the earlier technical notes on mixed effects models, experimental design, survey analysis, statistical inference, and tidymodels. More will be uploaded to github on a rolling basis.

[View projects](projects.qmd)
:::
:::

## Selected public links

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/nathan-onduma-7a80a0107/)
- [RPubs profile](https://rpubs.com/Onduma)
- [PubMed publication on visceral leishmaniasis sustainability](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39864498/)
- [Frontiers article on African leadership in ending NTDs](https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/tropical-diseases/articles/10.3389/fitd.2023.1116831/full)
